summary: Representative #68434 is already closed for shipped WhatsApp quote-reply support. No close/comment/label mutations are planned because all other hydrated refs are closed context or closed linked evidence, and the replacement PR mentioned from #56863 is #73961 but was not hydrated in this preflight.
